GetRatioCv method in interface CATICGMTopWireContinuity
GetRatioCv : returns oRatioCv = G2 curvature ratio of curvature vectors at connection iConnectionRank If the two curvature vectors are VC1 and VC2, then the curvature ratio is defined as 1 ------------------------------------------ 1 + ||VC1-VC2||/max(||VC1||,||VC2||) This method should be called only if SetMeasureMode(2) was called.
